title: ZX Snake & ZX Brick Released
content: Today marks a major milestone for BarkinMad Studios as [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake) and [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick) are now officially available on the Apple App Store.

Both games are inspired by the golden age of 8-bit arcade gaming while adding modern features designed for today's players. From quick gaming sessions to chasing leaderboard positions, both titles are built to capture the addictive gameplay that made classic arcade games so memorable.

[ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake) reimagines the classic snake formula with retro visuals, unlockable content, achievements, Game Center leaderboards, AI opponents, local multiplayer battles, and online player-versus-player matches.

[ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick) delivers fast-paced brick-breaking action across 100 handcrafted levels. Players can collect powerful upgrades, unlock achievements, compete for high scores, and experience a modern take on a timeless arcade classic.

Both games feature full Game Center integration, achievement systems, leaderboard support, and localisation across 32 languages, allowing players around the world to enjoy the experience in their preferred language.

[ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake) and [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick) are the first live releases in the connected [ZX Series](/zx-series), a collection of retro-inspired arcade games featuring shared achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and cross-game progression.

Development is already underway on [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), a retro-inspired arcade space shooter that will continue expanding the [ZX Series](/zx-series) and bring even more classic arcade experiences to modern mobile devices.

Thank you to everyone who has supported BarkinMad Studios throughout development. Download [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake) and [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick) today and start your journey to the top of the leaderboards.
